# uptime_maintenance_notification (Resource)

Notification rule for a maintenance schedule (alert N seconds before/after START or END).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptime_maintenance_notification" "before_start" {
  schedule_id    = uptime_maintenance_schedule.weekly_patching.id
  offset         = -1800 # 30 minutes before
  event          = "START"
  contact_groups = [uptime_contact.oncall.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `contact_groups` (Set of Number) Contact group IDs to notify. Use `uptime_contact.<name>.id`.
- `event` (String)
- `offset` (Number) Offset in seconds relative to the event; negative means before.
- `schedule_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `modified_at` (String)
